author: readwiseio
description: Sync highlights from Readwise to your vault.
name: Readwise Official

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Improved behavior at the end of syncing to ensure the sync contents are correct even if the previous sync wasn't downloaded properly.

If you have any questions, feel free to open a github issue or shoot us an email at [hello@readwise.io](mailto:hello@readwise.io) :)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Improves the recently published 3.0.0 release by making it possible to append full document text link to all existing notes.

If you have any questions, feel free to open a github issue or shoot us an email at [hello@readwise.io](mailto:hello@readwise.io) :)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Introduces support for Reader Document import (coming soon) and updating full content of notes that have not been modified in Obsidian since they were imported. This way new highlights will be appended to the Highlights section instead of creating new sections on every update.

For the new highlight appending feature to work for previously exported notes, they need to be deleted and imported again, having the "Resync deleted files" setting enabled.

If you have any questions, feel free to open a github issue or shoot us an email at [hello@readwise.io](mailto:hello@readwise.io) :)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fixes a bug in the previous version where duplicate files would be exported (or duplicate content appended to the end of files) for users with the "resync deleted files" setting and/or modified file structures.

Everything should be working properly again (but you may need to delete some duplicate files that were synced).

If you have any questions, feel free to open a github issue or shoot us an email at hello@readwise.io :)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Improved sync reliability (h/t to @tyler-dot-earth)
- Added weekly sync interval
- Delete & reimport works in reading view mode

releases.author: tadeoos
releases.description:
- keep the inner `booksIdMap` up to date on deletion
- change the misleading "sync happened on different device..." message

releases.author: tadeoos
releases.description:
- Mobile support 
- New command for single file refresh
- A lot of bug fixes

releases.author: tadeoos
releases.description:
- Fix typo in readme
- Keeps track of deleted files even if the toggle is off
- Move some notifications to status bar
- Ads client awareness and ack call

releases.author: tadeoos
releases.description:
- Better validation for the custom base folder setting
- Updated Readme with community resources

releases.author: tadeoos
releases.description: - Don't clear user token on plugin unload

releases.author: tadeoos
releases.description: The first release of the official Readwise plugin for Obsidian. This integration is still considered beta.
